_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the insertion-target / bookmark-not-found branch (C3) of the word-activities/add-picture-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders list-current-user -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get / logs (BusinessException: bookmark 'LogoAnchor' not found) -> workflow source (Add Picture nested in Use Word File, ImagePath is a valid absolute path, InsertRelativeTo='Bookmark' BookmarkName='LogoAnchor'). The combination of (InsertRelativeTo=Bookmark + BookmarkName=LogoAnchor in source) + (BusinessException 'bookmark LogoAnchor not found' at runtime) is decisive. Scrubbed: host->MOCK-HOST, robot->AUTOMATION1.

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
